title: Remote Work with Zyplo
body: Zyplo is built for distributed and hybrid teams.
This guide covers best practices for working remotely using Zyplo.

title: Setting Up Your Remote Team
body: Create a workspace for your remote team.
Invite members across different time zones.

subsections.title: Status Updates
body: Use comments and activity logs to share progress.
Avoid blocking teammates by documenting decisions.

subsections.title: Work Handoffs
body: Move tasks across columns when your part is done.
Mention teammates so they know what to do next.

title: Meetings & Planning
body: Use boards to plan sprints and milestones.
Track decisions in tasks instead of chat tools.

title: Building Remote Culture
body: Celebrate wins using comments and reactions.
Use transparency to build trust across the team.
